verse.name: v1
v2
verse.lines: A new dawn will come: A special wedding there will be, Where Christ and His Bride shall unite. Lord, I want to be there To tell You, "I do," And to live eternally with You. Lord, I want to be there To tell You, "I do." And to live eternally with You.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Who is this that appears like the dawn? He is so beautiful as the moon and shining as the sun. Oh! It’s the Bride who's emerging like a lily From the muck of this world, where confusion reigns. She goes to meet her Beloved; Her dress is of fine linen: Dressed in His Word To this wedding that is only for the redeemed, Who was purchased by the Blood of the Lord.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Lord, I want to be there To tell you, "I do," And to live eternally with You I believe…
